Promoting Your Webinar
Promoting To Your Email List
Don Crowther
The ideal situation is to have someone
on your email list before you invite
them to register for a webinar
The best pre-registration strategy
starts a week before you ever open up
the webinar registration page

Something Like This
•
•
•
•
People want you to talk to them as a
person, not as part of a group
“Y’all” is not only bad English,
it’s also a bad way to think
about the people on your list
They’re not a homogeneous
group, they’re individuals who
want to be talked to individually
